sglang.title: vlm: enable radix cache for qwen-vl models
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

support qwen2vl/qwen2.5vl radix cache
fix bugs about mrope calculation in qwen2vl/qwen2.5vl


Background
mrope is a special 3D position_id for qwen-vl models.
In order to calculate, it requires complete input_ids.
When radix-cache is enabled, this can be difficult, since the input_ids fr

vllm.title: Mistral-format support for compressed-tensors
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Allows for models in the Mistral-format (i.e. --tokenizer_mode mistral --config_format mistral --load_format mistral) that have been quantized using llm-compressor/compressed-tensors to be loaded. This is achieved by directly passing through the CT config in params["quantization"] to the config["qua

vllm.title: Improve Transformers backend model loading QoL
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Enable the use of --revision when loading models with the Transformers backend
Stop falling back to Transformers backend when --model-impl vllm is passed

vllm.title: `CacheConfig.block_size` should always be `int` when used
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
block_size should always be int by the time it is used. If it isn't errors would be thrown anyway.
This PR:

removes Optional from the dataclass field so that type checkers don't complain that you can't do arithmetic with None
improves the docstring explaining where this is normally set if the user

vllm.title: Use `@property` and private field for `data_parallel_rank_local`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Ensures that data_parallel_rank_local can be type hinted as an int, keeping type checkers happy.

vllm.title: [Frontend] Support guidance:no-additional-properties for compatibility with xgrammar
vllm.author: tjohnson31415
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The guidance guided decoding backend, has a change in behavior around additionalProperties for JSON object schemas:

guidance follows the JSON Schema spec and defaults to allowing additional properties
outlines and xgrammar both do not allow additional properties on objects by default

The main chan

vllm.title: [BugFix][V1] Fix int32 token index overflow when preparing input ids
vllm.author: shinoss
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #16414
The issue can be reproduced when setting max-model-len to a large value (e.g. 3600000) and sending requests without limiting the max number of requests (e.g. not restricting --max-num-seqs, sending requests without --max-concurrency) and/or not limiting max. number of tokens to be proce

vllm.title: [V1][Spec Decode] Always use argmax for sampling draft tokens
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR always samples draft tokens with argmax, regardless of the request’s temperature or other sampling parameters.
This will NOT affect the quality of the sampled outputs, but will affect (lower) the acceptance rate of the drafts, especially when the original temperature is high.
The reason behi

vllm.title: [CI/Build] workaround for CI build failure
vllm.author: csy1204
vllm.bodyExcerpt: FIX #17068 (link existing issues this PR will resolve)

vllm.title: [Quantization]add prefix for commandA quantized model
vllm.author: CXIAAAAA
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This is a pre-requisite for fp8/int8 quantized weight of commandA model.

vllm.title: [Minor] Use larger batch sizes for A100/B100/B200/MI300x
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: We should use larger batch sizes (max_num_batched_tokens and max_num_seqs) for GPUs with large memory sizes (e.g., 80GB+). Currently, we only special-handle H100 and H200. This PR extends this to more GPUs.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Enable V1 usage stats
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Calling report_usage wasn't ever piped down to V1 LLMEngine or AsyncLLM. @njhill changed accessing the CUDA device information to happen in a subprocess rather than a thread because we run into initializing cuda in the same proc potentially too early.
This could in theory fail if there isn't tempora

vllm.title: More informative error when using Transformers backend
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Should help uses encountering the first hurdle encountered in #16826.
Redirect from #remote-code to #custom-models should be added in RTD.

vllm.title: Addendum Fix to support FIPS enabled machines with MD5 hashing
vllm.author: sydarb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Complete FIPS compliance fixes for MD5 hashing
This PR completes the work started in the previous merge (#15299), which addressed the issue of FIPS-enabled machines prohibiting MD5 hashing. The previous PR used the usedforsecurity=False flag with hashlib.md5() to resolve the issue, but it missed app

vllm.author: zhangyuygss
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix CPU memory leak when generate n completions per-prompt.
Related issue:
FIX #12973
When set n>1, vllm uses ParallelSampleSequenceGroup to manage and put requests into engine.
In ParallelSampleSequenceGroup, it keeps adding id: processed request pair to engine.seq_id_to_seq_group:
class ParallelSa
